example: The government plans to build more schools this year.
exampleCn: 政府计划今年修建更多学校。

example: The new system makes online payment much easier.
exampleCn: 新系统让在线支付方便多了。

example: California is the most populous state in America.
exampleCn: 加利福尼亚是美国人口最多的州。

example: She pushed the heavy door with all her might.
exampleCn: 她用尽全力推那扇沉重的门。

example: This part of the machine needs to be replaced.
exampleCn: 机器的这个零件需要更换。

example: The plan sounds good; however, it costs too much.
exampleCn: 这个计划听起来不错，然而花费太高。

example: This area of the city is famous for its food.
exampleCn: 城里这片区域以美食闻名。

example: Many people are against the new tax plan.
exampleCn: 很多人反对新的税收方案。

example: The hotel can provide free breakfast for all guests.
exampleCn: 这家酒店可以为所有客人提供免费早餐。

example: Please mark the starting point on the map.
exampleCn: 请在地图上标出起点。

example: Please follow the teacher's instructions carefully.
exampleCn: 请认真遵循老师的指示。

example: You should finish the report within three days.
exampleCn: 你应该在三天之内完成报告。

example: We bought fresh vegetables at the local market.
exampleCn: 我们在当地市场买了新鲜蔬菜。

example: The TV program starts at eight tonight.
exampleCn: 这个电视节目今晚八点开始。

example: We still went hiking although it was raining.
exampleCn: 虽然下着雨，我们还是去远足了。

example: The fact is that nobody saw him leave.
exampleCn: 事实是没有人看到他离开。

example: She is busy with social activities every weekend.
exampleCn: 她每个周末都忙于社交活动。

example: He started his own business after college.
exampleCn: 大学毕业后他开始自己做生意。

example: Accidents often happen on this narrow road.
exampleCn: 这条狭窄的路上经常发生事故。

example: Knowledge gives people the power to change their lives.
exampleCn: 知识赋予人们改变生活的力量。

example: She shows great interest in classical music.
exampleCn: 她对古典音乐表现出浓厚的兴趣。

example: Today is a national holiday in France.
exampleCn: 今天是法国的全国性节日。

example: The water level of the river rose after the rain.
exampleCn: 雨后河水水位上涨了。

example: Climate change is a serious issue for every country.
exampleCn: 气候变化是每个国家都面临的严重问题。

example: We should perhaps wait until tomorrow morning.
exampleCn: 我们也许应该等到明天早上。

example: The company has a strict policy on smoking.
exampleCn: 公司有严格的禁烟政策。

example: The city council will discuss the new park plan.
exampleCn: 市政委员会将讨论新公园的规划。

example: The case will be heard in court next week.
exampleCn: 这个案子下周将在法院开庭审理。

example: My parents allow me to play games on weekends.
exampleCn: 父母允许我在周末玩游戏。

example: The new medicine had a quick effect on her.
exampleCn: 新药对她很快产生了效果。

example: Our team is in the lead by two points.
exampleCn: 我们队以两分的优势领先。

example: The result of the exam will come out on Friday.
exampleCn: 考试结果将于周五公布。

example: Please draw a straight line on the paper.
exampleCn: 请在纸上画一条直线。

example: He has no interest in political debates.
exampleCn: 他对政治辩论不感兴趣。

example: Everyone must obey the law of the country.
exampleCn: 人人都必须遵守国家法律。

example: I will call you later this afternoon.
exampleCn: 今天下午晚些时候我会给你打电话。

example: Be careful not to lose your keys again.
exampleCn: 小心别再把钥匙弄丢了。

example: Only the manager has the authority to sign this.
exampleCn: 只有经理有权签署这份文件。

example: Stars appear in the sky after dark.
exampleCn: 天黑后星星出现在天空中。

example: We will continue the meeting after lunch.
exampleCn: 午饭后我们将继续开会。

example: The minister announced a new education plan today.
exampleCn: 部长今天宣布了一项新的教育计划。

example: This factory can produce ten thousand cars a year.
exampleCn: 这家工厂一年能生产一万辆汽车。

example: People in this community help each other a lot.
exampleCn: 这个社区的人们经常互相帮助。

example: The unemployment rate fell to five percent last month.
exampleCn: 上个月失业率降到了百分之五。

example: In general, children need more sleep than adults.
exampleCn: 总的来说，孩子比成人需要更多睡眠。

example: At least fifty people attended the meeting.
exampleCn: 至少有五十人参加了会议。

example: The president will visit three countries next month.
exampleCn: 总统下个月将访问三个国家。

example: The war lasted for almost ten years.
exampleCn: 这场战争持续了将近十年。

example: Is this a real diamond or a fake one?
exampleCn: 这是真钻石还是假的？

example: Our team won the basketball game yesterday.
exampleCn: 我们队昨天赢了篮球比赛。

example: She accepted the job offer from the bank.
exampleCn: 她接受了那家银行的工作邀约。

example: The view from the mountain top is amazing.
exampleCn: 山顶上的风景美极了。

example: The little kid is learning to ride a bike.
exampleCn: 那个小孩正在学骑自行车。

example: Please consider my suggestion before you decide.
exampleCn: 在做决定之前请考虑一下我的建议。

example: The new term begins in early September.
exampleCn: 新学期九月初开始。

example: She walked slowly towards the train station.
exampleCn: 她慢慢朝火车站走去。

example: The museum is open to the public for free.
exampleCn: 博物馆向公众免费开放。

example: These plants require plenty of water and sunlight.
exampleCn: 这些植物需要充足的水分和阳光。

example: The factory was closed for a long period.
exampleCn: 这家工厂关闭了很长一段时期。

example: Write each figure clearly on the form.
exampleCn: 把每个数字清楚地写在表格上。

example: Education plays an important role in modern society.
exampleCn: 教育在现代社会中起着重要作用。

example: The shopping centre is crowded on weekends.
exampleCn: 周末购物中心很拥挤。

example: The police arrived five minutes after the call.
exampleCn: 接到电话五分钟后警察就赶到了。

example: Please add some sugar to my coffee.
exampleCn: 请在我的咖啡里加点糖。

example: Artists create beautiful works from simple materials.
exampleCn: 艺术家用简单的材料创造出美丽的作品。

example: It will probably rain this evening.
exampleCn: 今晚很可能会下雨。

example: Free Wi-Fi is available in every room.
exampleCn: 每个房间都有免费无线网络可用。

example: The pilot lost control of the plane briefly.
exampleCn: 飞行员一度失去了对飞机的控制。

example: We must take action to protect the environment.
exampleCn: 我们必须采取行动保护环境。

example: Learning a language is a long process.
exampleCn: 学习一门语言是一个漫长的过程。

example: Please remain seated until the plane stops.
exampleCn: 飞机停稳前请保持坐好。

example: He applied for a teaching position at the school.
exampleCn: 他申请了这所学校的一个教学职位。

example: She studies art at a famous university.
exampleCn: 她在一所著名大学学习艺术。

example: I signed up for an English course online.
exampleCn: 我在网上报了一门英语课程。

example: Our teacher told us stories from Chinese history.
exampleCn: 老师给我们讲了中国历史上的故事。

example: Every child has the right to free education.
exampleCn: 每个孩子都有接受免费教育的权利。

example: I have actually never been to Beijing.
exampleCn: 其实我从没去过北京。

example: What type of music do you like best?
exampleCn: 你最喜欢哪种类型的音乐？

example: The team is doing research on heart disease.
exampleCn: 这个团队正在做心脏病方面的研究。

example: Our school hopes to win the final game.
exampleCn: 我们学校希望赢得决赛。

example: That guy in the blue shirt is my brother.
exampleCn: 那个穿蓝衬衫的家伙是我哥哥。

example: The value of the house has doubled in ten years.
exampleCn: 这栋房子的价值十年间翻了一倍。

example: The police used force to stop the fight.
exampleCn: 警察使用武力制止了斗殴。

example: Helping the old man was a kind act.
exampleCn: 帮助那位老人是善良的行为。

example: The main entrance of the building faces the street.
exampleCn: 大楼的主入口朝向街道。

example: Try to eat less sugar for your health.
exampleCn: 为了健康，尽量少吃糖。

example: Think carefully before you make a final decision.
exampleCn: 在做出最终决定之前要仔细考虑。

example: The car industry employs millions of workers.
exampleCn: 汽车工业雇用了数百万工人。

example: The boat sailed slowly toward the small island.
exampleCn: 小船缓缓驶向那座小岛。

example: The doctor asked the patient to rest more.
exampleCn: 医生让病人多休息。

example: Her major at university is computer science.
exampleCn: 她大学的主修课是计算机科学。

example: The family goes to church every Sunday morning.
exampleCn: 这家人每周日早上去教堂做礼拜。

example: Can you describe the man you saw last night?
exampleCn: 你能描述一下昨晚见到的那个人吗？

example: Every human needs food, water, and sleep.
exampleCn: 每个人都需要食物、水和睡眠。

example: The old bridge is in poor condition now.
exampleCn: 这座旧桥现在状况很差。

example: The country is facing serious economic problems.
exampleCn: 这个国家正面临严重的经济问题。

example: Keep medicines out of the reach of children.
exampleCn: 把药品放在孩子够不到的地方。

example: The final decision depends upon the weather tomorrow.
exampleCn: 最终决定取决于明天的天气。

example: Dogs have a strong sense of smell.
exampleCn: 狗的嗅觉非常灵敏。

example: This castle was built in the twelfth century.
exampleCn: 这座城堡建于十二世纪。

example: He was ill, and therefore missed the meeting.
exampleCn: 他病了，因此错过了会议。

example: Please read the first section of the report.
exampleCn: 请阅读报告的第一节。

example: The whole nation celebrated the team's victory.
exampleCn: 全国上下都在庆祝球队的胜利。

example: Swimming is my favorite outdoor activity.
exampleCn: 游泳是我最喜欢的户外活动。

example: The death of the old king shocked the country.
exampleCn: 老国王的死讯震惊了全国。

example: The project will involve scientists from five countries.
exampleCn: 这个项目将包括来自五个国家的科学家。

example: She has ten years of teaching experience.
exampleCn: 她有十年的教学经验。

example: What sort of food do you like best?
exampleCn: 你最喜欢哪种食物？

example: It is likely to snow this weekend.
exampleCn: 这个周末很可能会下雪。

example: The hotel staff were friendly and helpful.
exampleCn: 酒店的员工友好又乐于助人。

example: Some chemicals can kill insects very quickly.
exampleCn: 有些化学品能迅速杀死昆虫。

example: Pay particular attention to the last question.
exampleCn: 要特别注意最后一道题。

example: She works for an international trading company.
exampleCn: 她在一家国际贸易公司工作。

example: Mom cooked a special dinner for my birthday.
exampleCn: 妈妈为我的生日做了一顿特别的晚餐。

example: I am certain that he will pass the exam.
exampleCn: 我确信他会通过考试。

example: The weather was particularly cold last winter.
exampleCn: 去年冬天天气格外寒冷。

example: The former president now teaches at a university.
exampleCn: 这位前总统现在在一所大学教书。

example: Good management is the key to business success.
exampleCn: 良好的管理是企业成功的关键。

example: She works in the sales department of the company.
exampleCn: 她在公司的销售部门工作。

example: The committee will meet to discuss the plan.
exampleCn: 委员会将开会讨论这项计划。

example: Parents play an important role in children's growth.
exampleCn: 父母在孩子的成长中扮演重要角色。

example: This product sells well in many countries.
exampleCn: 这种产品在许多国家都很畅销。

example: She spent the whole day cleaning the house.
exampleCn: 她花了一整天打扫房子。

example: Success usually comes after years of effort.
exampleCn: 成功通常来自多年的努力。

example: The police found new evidence at the scene.
exampleCn: 警方在现场发现了新的证据。

example: I would rather stay home than go out tonight.
exampleCn: 今晚我宁愿待在家也不想出去。

example: This drug can lower blood pressure quickly.
exampleCn: 这种药能迅速降低血压。

example: A good leader listens to his team members.
exampleCn: 好的领导者会倾听团队成员的意见。

example: She has a sweet voice and sings very well.
exampleCn: 她嗓音甜美，歌唱得很好。

example: The workers joined the union to protect their rights.
exampleCn: 工人们加入工会以维护自己的权益。

example: After hours of waiting, the train finally arrived.
exampleCn: 等了几个小时后，火车终于到了。

example: The opening ceremony was a big event for the city.
exampleCn: 开幕式是这座城市的一件大事。

example: His father served in the military for twenty years.
exampleCn: 他父亲在军队服役了二十年。

example: Smoking is a major cause of lung disease.
exampleCn: 吸烟是肺部疾病的主要原因。

example: He missed the bus and thus arrived late.
exampleCn: 他错过了公交车，因此迟到了。

example: Can you explain this rule to me again?
exampleCn: 你能再给我解释一下这条规则吗？

example: Thank you for your support during the hard times.
exampleCn: 感谢你在困难时期给予的支持。

example: The project is still at an early stage.
exampleCn: 这个项目还处于早期阶段。

example: The shop sells a wide range of toys.
exampleCn: 这家店出售各种各样的玩具。

example: International trade between the two countries is growing fast.
exampleCn: 两国之间的国际贸易增长迅速。

example: She has a close relationship with her grandmother.
exampleCn: 她和祖母的关系很亲密。

example: I am happy to accept your kind invitation.
exampleCn: 我很高兴接受你的盛情邀请。

example: The ancient Greeks believed in more than one god.
exampleCn: 古希腊人信奉不止一位神。

example: He joined the chess club at school.
exampleCn: 他参加了学校的国际象棋俱乐部。

example: The federal government controls the national budget.
exampleCn: 联邦政府掌管国家预算。

example: There is a big difference between the two plans.
exampleCn: 这两个方案之间有很大的差异。

example: She gave a clear account of the accident.
exampleCn: 她对事故经过作了清楚的叙述。

example: This jacket is made of waterproof material.
exampleCn: 这件夹克由防水材料制成。

example: Stay calm when you are in a dangerous situation.
exampleCn: 身处危险情形时要保持冷静。

example: He built a model of the famous bridge.
exampleCn: 他制作了那座著名大桥的模型。

example: The doctor keeps a record of every patient.
exampleCn: 医生为每位病人保存记录。

example: Everyone with a job must pay income tax.
exampleCn: 每个有工作的人都必须缴纳所得税。

example: Our class finished the science project on time.
exampleCn: 我们班按时完成了科学课题项目。

example: The director is shooting a new movie in Paris.
exampleCn: 导演正在巴黎拍摄一部新电影。

example: He is the best player on our football team.
exampleCn: 他是我们足球队最优秀的队员。

example: The army built a new base near the border.
exampleCn: 军队在边境附近建了一个新基地。

example: I love fruit, especially fresh strawberries.
exampleCn: 我喜欢水果，尤其是新鲜的草莓。

example: New workers receive two weeks of training.
exampleCn: 新员工要接受两周的培训。

example: There is not enough space for another bed.
exampleCn: 没有足够的空间再放一张床了。

example: The hotel is in the central part of the city.
exampleCn: 这家酒店位于城市的中心地带。

example: You can apply for the job online.
exampleCn: 你可以在网上申请这份工作。

example: The company saw a big increase in sales.
exampleCn: 公司的销售额大幅增加。

example: A government official answered questions from reporters.
exampleCn: 一位政府官员回答了记者的提问。

example: My sister studies law at a famous university.
exampleCn: 我姐姐在一所著名大学学习法律。

example: The young couple bought their first house last year.
exampleCn: 这对年轻夫妇去年买了他们的第一套房子。

example: Workers are building a school on this site.
exampleCn: 工人们正在这块场地上建一所学校。

example: He made a claim for damages after the accident.
exampleCn: 事故后他提出了赔偿要求。

example: Be careful not to hit your head on the door.
exampleCn: 小心别让头撞到门上。

example: The movie was indeed better than I expected.
exampleCn: 这部电影确实比我预期的好。

example: This brand is famous for its high quality.
exampleCn: 这个品牌以高质量著称。

example: Wearing a uniform is a rule at our school.
exampleCn: 穿校服是我们学校的一条规定。

example: The price of oil rose sharply this year.
exampleCn: 今年油价大幅上涨。

example: These apples cost two dollars a pound.
exampleCn: 这些苹果两美元一磅。

example: The data shows that sales doubled last year.
exampleCn: 数据显示去年销售额翻了一番。

example: We should live in harmony with nature.
exampleCn: 我们应该与大自然和谐相处。

example: Smith is a very common family name in England.
exampleCn: 史密斯在英国是个很常见的姓氏。

example: The satellite sent back a clear image of Earth.
exampleCn: 卫星传回了一张清晰的地球图像。

example: A police officer helped the lost child get home.
exampleCn: 一位警官帮助走失的孩子回了家。

example: My phone rang twice during the meeting.
exampleCn: 开会时我的电话响了两次。

example: The structure of the bridge is very strong.
exampleCn: 这座桥的结构非常坚固。

example: These vegetables contain many important vitamins.
exampleCn: 这些蔬菜含有许多重要的维生素。

example: Each unit of the textbook has ten new words.
exampleCn: 课本的每个单元有十个生词。

example: This teaching method works well with young children.
exampleCn: 这种教学方法对幼儿很有效。

example: The dancer's every movement was smooth and graceful.
exampleCn: 这位舞者的每个动作都流畅而优雅。

example: Please tell me every detail of the plan.
exampleCn: 请把计划的每个细节都告诉我。

example: Her most recent book sold very well.
exampleCn: 她最近出的那本书卖得很好。

example: We should reduce the use of plastic bags.
exampleCn: 我们应该减少塑料袋的使用。

example: This is my personal opinion, not the company's.
exampleCn: 这是我个人的看法，不代表公司。

example: We will have a math test next Monday.
exampleCn: 下周一我们有一场数学测试。

example: We watched a funny movie last night.
exampleCn: 我们昨晚看了一部有趣的电影。

example: The two countries agreed to establish trade relations.
exampleCn: 两国同意建立贸易关系。

example: This is a private letter, so please do not read it.
exampleCn: 这是私人信件，请不要看。

example: Be quiet as you approach the sleeping baby.
exampleCn: 接近熟睡的婴儿时要保持安静。

example: She spent a large amount of money on books.
exampleCn: 她花了一大笔钱买书。

example: Modern technology has changed our daily lives.
exampleCn: 现代技术改变了我们的日常生活。

example: The first step is to read the instructions.
exampleCn: 第一步是阅读说明。

example: The city announced a new scheme to reduce traffic.
exampleCn: 市政府宣布了一项缓解交通的新方案。

example: She received an award for her excellent work.
exampleCn: 她因工作出色而获得了奖项。

example: Many young people seek jobs in big cities.
exampleCn: 许多年轻人到大城市寻找工作。

example: Please pay attention to the traffic lights.

example: Please read the first chapter before class.

example: You can choose any book from the shelf.

example: He is a republican who supports lower taxes.
exampleCn: 他是一名支持减税的共和党人。

example: The two companies signed a big deal yesterday.
exampleCn: 两家公司昨天签订了一笔大交易。

example: She works for an organization that helps poor children.
exampleCn: 她在一家帮助贫困儿童的组织工作。

example: His theory explains why prices rise so fast.
exampleCn: 他的理论解释了物价为何上涨如此之快。

example: The river is the main source of drinking water.
exampleCn: 这条河是饮用水的主要来源。

example: The house is the family's most valuable property.
exampleCn: 这栋房子是这个家庭最值钱的财产。

example: The company is in serious financial trouble.
exampleCn: 这家公司陷入了严重的财务困境。

example: He works for a law firm in London.
exampleCn: 他在伦敦的一家律师事务所工作。

example: I sent my application to three universities.
exampleCn: 我向三所大学递交了申请。

example: The factory increased its production of electric cars.
exampleCn: 这家工厂提高了电动汽车的产量。

example: Please write your name on the board.
exampleCn: 请把你的名字写在板子上。

example: Food is an important part of Chinese culture.
exampleCn: 饮食是中国文化的重要组成部分。

example: The king ruled the country for forty years.
exampleCn: 这位国王统治了这个国家四十年。

example: The country has a population of over one billion.
exampleCn: 这个国家的人口超过十亿。

example: This is your last chance to change your answer.
exampleCn: 这是你最后一次修改答案的机会。

example: Young children are always full of energy.
exampleCn: 小孩子总是精力充沛。

example: I did not realize how late it was.
exampleCn: 我没有意识到已经这么晚了。

example: Studying abroad is a great opportunity to learn.
exampleCn: 出国留学是一个很好的学习机会。

example: The operation on his knee lasted two hours.
exampleCn: 他膝盖的手术持续了两个小时。

example: The lord owned all the land in the village.
exampleCn: 这位领主拥有村里所有的土地。

example: She signed a two-year contract with the company.
exampleCn: 她和公司签了一份两年的合约。

example: Studying medicine was a wise choice for you.
exampleCn: 学医对你来说是一个明智的选择。

example: Airport security checks every passenger's bag carefully.
exampleCn: 机场安检会仔细检查每位乘客的行李。

example: Earthquakes occur quite frequently in this area.
exampleCn: 这个地区经常发生地震。

example: The new administration promised to cut taxes soon.
exampleCn: 新一届政府承诺尽快减税。

example: The new law must pass through congress first.
exampleCn: 新法律必须先在国会获得通过。

example: The presidential election takes place every four years.
exampleCn: 总统选举每四年举行一次。

example: She launched a campaign to clean up the river.
exampleCn: 她发起了一场清理河流的运动。

example: He bought a used car at a low price.
exampleCn: 他以低价买了一辆二手车。

example: The population of this city is growing quickly.
exampleCn: 这座城市的人口增长很快。

example: The store sells various kinds of cheese.
exampleCn: 这家店出售各种各样的奶酪。

example: The rise in food prices worries many families.
exampleCn: 食品价格的上涨让许多家庭担忧。

example: The economy is growing faster than expected.
exampleCn: 经济增长快于预期。

example: The red lines on the map represent rivers.
exampleCn: 地图上的红线表示河流。

example: She needs medical care after the accident.
exampleCn: 事故后她需要医疗护理。

example: The company reported a heavy loss this year.
exampleCn: 这家公司今年报告了严重亏损。

example: There is a high risk of fire in dry weather.
exampleCn: 干燥天气下发生火灾的危险很高。

example: Please speak clearly so everyone can hear you.
exampleCn: 请说清楚一点，让大家都能听见。

example: The current price of gold is very high.
exampleCn: 目前的金价非常高。

example: This hotel offers a high standard of service.
exampleCn: 这家酒店提供高标准的服务。

example: The purpose of this meeting is to set goals.
exampleCn: 这次会议的目的是确定目标。

example: Regular exercise is of great benefit to your health.
exampleCn: 经常锻炼对你的健康大有益处。

example: The teacher praised the students for their good behavior.
exampleCn: 老师表扬了学生们的良好行为。

example: Does anyone know the answer to this question?
exampleCn: 有人知道这个问题的答案吗？

example: Price is an important factor when buying a car.
exampleCn: 价格是买车时要考虑的一个重要因素。

example: Can you prove that this story is true?
exampleCn: 你能证明这个故事是真的吗？

example: The two brothers often argue about small things.
exampleCn: 这兄弟俩经常为小事争论。
